title: Vice
lyrics: And your vice, feel you right We'll do it all right, we'll do it all right Think of me as your vice, have you heard of that? Every night I hit it right, ayy Think of me as just a nice like to be It's just a nice side, it's all the same And I know one day I'll hit it and get it good Girl, know you ready to hit me the way it's good So when they get it on top And you're ridin' like a rodeo hit In the bar where we pop when the night goes Let me think that in my life goes Got new future three, ayy Got new family with, ayy Man, I may be a vice But you know I do it right every night, ayy I may be a vice But here's some advice Don't let it strangle you, don't let that moment go Best of then, or worst of then I just know that we are Say it ain't no better, but I'll be a better than a star Ooh, when you're lookin' so good Ooh, when you're ridin' when you should And you blow my mind like a mother's son Hella with hella storms, hella with hella gnomes Fuck the norm, you know we can just sit there And be something more than that, that name In the name to me, in beneath the knee I don't know if we're even if you see Givin' me my shit How you givin' me that shit? Yeah, vice when I come around, you know I'm your vice, well, I'm every time For sure, and I know That you like the rodeo too Oh, girl, once more And three times, once more And you know I just said I know, like, $50 not Vice in the ceiling and vice in the night Here's some advice, you can do me alright If you do me at night, it'll make me a knight It's Johnny, I'm a destiny, you wanna, wanna see It takes a little bit to be there It takes a little bit to get there In the end, you just see It's all about the mentality Of you and me, what advice did you know? We can't spend a lot of time, but we know the flow Don't interrupt, then there's no punchin' presses And you know we're just that friend What's the benefit of fearin' that we're enemies? I don't wanna be enemies, it's you and me Oh, it's you and me at night With advice, and they do it alright And I know that shit just can't be More than just the most amusing girl The planet seems like a fantasy On top of me, a fantasy And I got it all, I know, in fact, you're the number one I want it, wanna, wanna, wanna, wanna, wanna win With you on my team, no sin Oh, girl, no, whoa, whoa
